purpose: Binary verification of closes-#24 class FP elimination — the load-bearing ship-gate per validator mandate closes_issues_verified_binary

fp_repros.verdict: PASS — all 3 historical FP-repro fixtures yield 0 findings (closes-#24 class binary-verified)

string_literal_corpus.scope: All 83 string-literal regression-guard fixtures across 19 language dirs (c, composite, cpp, csharp, elixir, go, java, javascript, kotlin, lua, luau, ocaml, php, python, ruby, rust, scala, swift, typescript)
string_literal_corpus.verdict: PASS — 100% — closes-#24 root mandate fully satisfied; no language exhibits string-literal substring FPs at the binary
string_literal_corpus.method: tldr vuln <fixture> --lang <lang> --format json | python json.load with stderr separated

positive_corpus.scope: All 83 positive-detection fixtures across 19 language dirs

known_carry_forward_failures.category: M3-CF-01 source-bank-gap class — orthogonal source/sink AST-bank coverage gaps
known_carry_forward_failures.rationale: These fixtures all exercise vulnerability flows for which the canonical AST source banks (taint.rs) and/or sink banks for the given language do not yet enumerate the specific source primitive (e.g. argv/Request.Query/conn.params) or sink primitive (e.g. Marshal.load/scala.io.Source/Swift.Process.launchPath) used by the fixture. They are NOT introduced by M5 — they were already RED at M4 (133/166) and M3 (131/166).
known_carry_forward_failures.precedent: Same disposition as M3-CF-01 (35 RED tests, sink-bank gap) and M4-CF-01 (python_xss_positive, response.write XSS sink gap). Deferred to a follow-on source-bank-parity-v1 milestone analogous to M2's sink-bank audit.
known_carry_forward_failures.rust_specific: Rust ssrf/command_injection/deserialization/path_traversal fixtures route through analyze_rust_file (Rust line-scanner), NOT canonical taint engine — explicitly OUT OF SCOPE per Reframe C and validator_mandate rust_line_scanner_out_of_scope (vuln-migration-v1 collapses Python/14-other-langs onto canonical taint engine; Rust line-scanner is a distinct Rust-specific concern).
known_carry_forward_failures.future_work: vuln-source-parity-v1 follow-on milestone — extend AST source banks and sink banks at crates/tldr-core/src/security/taint.rs for the 28 enumerated fixture combinations + the 4 from M3-CF-01 not in this list (e.g., python_xss response.write).

positive_corpus.verdict: PASS-WITH-DOCUMENTED-CARRY-FORWARD — 28 positive failures all attributable to known M3-CF-01 source-bank-gap class; not closes-#24-blocking
positive_corpus.method: for each crates/tldr-cli/tests/fixtures/vuln_migration_v1/<lang>/<vuln>_positive.<ext>, tldr vuln --lang <lang> --format json | python parse, stderr separated

tldr_cli_remaining_vuln_unit.verdict: PASS — includes test_vuln_type_cwe_mapping, test_vuln_type_severity, test_collect_files_includes_rust, all 6 test_analyze_rust_*

vuln_sarif_deserialization_test.verdict: PASS — SARIF rules.name/shortDescription via vuln_type_name (M4-DEVIATION-01) preserved

vuln_migration_v1_red.verdict: BASELINE-PRESERVED — 133/166 same as M4 baseline; 33 RED tests are M3-CF-01 + M4-CF-01 carry-forward (source-bank gaps), not introduced by M5

clippy_dead_code_sweep.verdict: PASS — zero warnings, zero dead_code, zero unused-imports across workspace. M3 + M4 already left a clean tree.

closes_issues_at_release_status.issue_24_string_literal_substring_FP: CLOSED — ship gate met; 100% (83/83) of string-literal regression-guard corpus + all 3 historical FP-repro fixtures yield 0 findings at the binary. The half left open by regex-removal-v1, FAI-v1, and sanitizer-removal-v1 is now closed.
closes_issues_at_release_status.issue_24_remaining_source_bank_gaps: DEFERRED to vuln-source-parity-v1 follow-on milestone — 28 positive-detection fixtures across c/cpp/csharp/elixir/java/lua/luau/ocaml/ruby/rust/scala/swift not yet covered by canonical AST source banks. Not closes-#24-shaped (those were FP elimination); these are detection-coverage gaps for the corresponding non-Python source primitives. Documented as M3-CF-01 + M4-CF-01 + M5 enumeration.

ship_gate_decision: PASS — atomic commit authorized. All 4 binary verification gates met (cargo install + 3 FP-repros + 83 string-literal corpus); positive corpus failures are documented carry-forward, not closes-#24-blocking.
